Package microui.layout

Class GridLayoutParams

java.lang.Object
microui.layout.GridLayoutParams
All Implemented Interfaces:
LayoutParams
public final class GridLayoutParams extends Object implements LayoutParams
Layout parameters for positioning components within a GridLayout. Defines grid coordinates, spanning, and alignment for components in a grid-based layout.

GridLayoutParams specifies where and how a component should be placed within a GridLayout: - Grid coordinates (column, row) determine starting cell - Span values (columnSpan, rowSpan) determine how many cells the component occupies - Alignment values (alignX, alignY) control positioning within the allocated cell space

See Also:

  • GridLayout

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GridLayoutParams(int column, int row)
    Constructs GridLayoutParams for a single cell with default center alignment.
    GridLayoutParams(int column, int row, int columnSpan, int rowSpan)
    Constructs GridLayoutParams with default center alignment.
    GridLayoutParams(int column, int row, int columnSpan, int rowSpan, int alignX, int alignY)
    Constructs GridLayoutParams with all parameters specified.

  • Constructor Details

    • GridLayoutParams

      public GridLayoutParams(int column, int row, int columnSpan, int rowSpan, int alignX, int alignY)
      Constructs GridLayoutParams with all parameters specified.
      Parameters:
      column - the starting column index (0-based, must be в‰Ґ 0)
      row - the starting row index (0-based, must be в‰Ґ 0)
      columnSpan - the number of columns to span (must be в‰Ґ 1)
      rowSpan - the number of rows to span (must be в‰Ґ 1)
      alignX - horizontal alignment (-1=left, 0=center, 1=right)
      alignY - vertical alignment (-1=top, 0=center, 1=bottom)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is out of valid range

    • GridLayoutParams

      public GridLayoutParams(int column, int row, int columnSpan, int rowSpan)
      Constructs GridLayoutParams with default center alignment.
      Parameters:
      column - the starting column index (0-based)
      row - the starting row index (0-based)
      columnSpan - the number of columns to span
      rowSpan - the number of rows to span

    • GridLayoutParams

      public GridLayoutParams(int column, int row)
      Constructs GridLayoutParams for a single cell with default center alignment.
      Parameters:
      column - the column index (0-based)
      row - the row index (0-based)

      public int getAlignY()
      Returns the vertical alignment.
      Returns:
